title: Junior SEO Specialist at Ecom Express

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Ecom Express
jsonLd.description:
Ecom Express invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
